rule_metadata.name: lyncsmash
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'lyncsmash' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule lyncsmash
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'lyncsmash' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "lyncsmash"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /UCCAPI\/16\.0\.13328\.20130\sOC\/16\.0\.13426\.20234/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
